notes: MegaDataExtractor 1.4.3 — output paths moved to %APPDATA%\MegaLoad\ (universal, no more 'Valheim Mods' folder dropped onto users' desktops). Character portraits now live at %APPDATA%\MegaLoad\character-portraits\. Added a subtle hint beneath the stylised fallback portrait pointing users at Valheim's character-select screen to capture the real render.
